wine_bars.name: Bar a Vins du Cafe du Musee
wine_bars.wine_program: Bordeaux-focused list of 200+ references by the glass and bottle; daily rotating Medoc and Right Bank by-the-glass selections
wine_bars.description: Intimate wine bar in the Saint-Pierre quarter with sommelier-curated rotating glass list strong in crus bourgeois and petit chateau Bordeaux; food-friendly plates.

wine_bars.name: Le Chapon Fin Bar a Vins
wine_bars.wine_program: 600-label Bordeaux-centric cellar; by-the-glass list rotated weekly by sommelier team; vertical flights of classified growths available
wine_bars.description: The historic Chapon Fin brasserie's ground-floor wine bar, one of Bordeaux's most celebrated cellars with 600 references. Flights across all major Bordeaux appellations; full food menu available.

wine_bars.name: Wine Not Bar a Vins
wine_bars.wine_program: Independent natural and classic Bordeaux list; 150 references; strong Pessac-Leognan and satellite appellations; natural producers from Fronsac and Entre-Deux-Mers
wine_bars.description: Saint-Michel neighbourhood wine bar with a progressive list balancing natural Bordeaux producers against classic appellations; unpretentious atmosphere popular with vigneron community.

wine_bars.name: Bodega Bar a Vins
wine_bars.wine_program: Chartrons merchant-district wine bar with 250+ Bordeaux references; focus on second and third labels of classed growths; well-priced by-the-glass programme
wine_bars.description: Riverside bar in the historic Chartrons wine-merchant quarter, with 250 Bordeaux references from affordable crus bourgeois to classified growths. Regular producer meet-and-greet evenings.

wine_bars.name: Cafe Lavinal
wine_bars.wine_program: Cazes family bistro and wine bar in the village of Bages; Lynch-Bages, Echo de Lynch-Bages, and regional Medoc producers by the glass; full-appellation Pauillac list
wine_bars.description: Cazes family-run village bar and bistro in the beautifully restored Bages hamlet, offering Lynch-Bages and Medoc pours alongside traditional Girondine food; popular lunch stop on Medoc vineyard tours.

wine_bars.name: L'Oiseau Vins
wine_bars.wine_program: Independent sommelier-run bar with 80 rotating references; emphasis on grower Bordeaux and lesser-known appellations; regular vertical tastings of en-primeur releases
wine_bars.description: Compact wine bar near Marche des Capucins run by a sommelier couple; rotating 80-bottle list emphasises satellite appellations and biodynamic producers often overlooked by mainstream cellars.

wine_bars.name: Cepage Wine Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Saint-Emilion specialist bar; 120 references spanning Grand Cru to Premier Grand Cru Classe; vertical flights of 2015, 2018, 2019 and 2020 available
wine_bars.description: Village wine bar in the heart of Saint-Emilion with a Right Bank-focused list and regular producer vertical tastings. Terrace seating with views over the medieval village.

wine_bars.name: Latitude 20 Bar a Vins
wine_bars.wine_program: International plus Bordeaux selection; 200 references; strong Pessac-Leognan and Graves blanc programme; regular themed tastings with growers
wine_bars.description: Chartrons wine bar with a sommelier-driven 200-label list mixing Bordeaux appellations with a short international selection. Long bar counter and cave seating; popular wine-trade social venue.
